description_long: This is a compact, Art Deco-inspired filing cabinet constructed primarily from a reddish-brown wood, featuring three stacked drawers on the front. The sides are adorned with two parallel, diagonal metallic or painted accent stripes, adding a decorative touch. A distinctive circular metallic or painted ring encircles the lower portion of the cabinet, connecting the base and the main body. The base is broad and stable, with a slightly raised platform that matches the metallic accents. The drawers are equipped with rectangular recessed handles, and there are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for stylish urban interiors or offices.
description: A compact, wood filing cabinet with three drawers, metallic accent stripes, and a circular base ring in an Art Deco style.
description_view_0: Side view showing two diagonal metallic accent stripes and the circular ring detail.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three drawers with recessed handles and the circular ring partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the accent stripes and ring detail seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain wooden surface with the circular ring wrapping around the back.
